svg.title: ML-Powered Adaptive Firewall Architecture
svg.desc: System architecture showing traffic ingestion, ML analysis, rule engine, and response layers

g.text: Raw network packets captured via pcap / eBPF
IP, port, protocol, payload size, packet rate, flow duration, flags
Auto-generates / updates firewall rules based on ML output + thresholds

svg.text: Dashboard — real-time alerts, threat logs, rule audit trail (Flask / React)
